SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.vibration

Class PipingFivScreening

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.vibration.PipingFivScreening
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PipingFivScreening extends Object implements Serializable
Energy Institute AVIFF flow-induced vibration screening calculator.

Implements a Likelihood Of Failure (LOF) score from the contributory factors described in the EI "Guidelines for the Avoidance of Vibration Induced Fatigue Failure in Process Pipework" (AVIFF). The score combines the dominant flow energy term (ρv² for gas or v for liquid) with weighting factors for D/t ratio, branch geometry, pulsation source, and support quality.

The exact AVIFF expressions are proprietary; this implementation uses public open-form approximations consistent with the LOF bands described in the standard. Results are intended for screening - a PipingFivLikelihood.HIGH or PipingFivLikelihood.VERY_HIGH outcome triggers a detailed dynamic assessment (FEA, strain gauging).

Inputs (gas service):

  • density [kg/m³]
  • velocity [m/s]
  • pipe outside diameter [m]
  • pipe wall thickness [m]
  • branch count (number of small bore connections)
  • pulsation source factor: 1.0 (steady) - 4.0 (reciprocating compressor near-field)
  • support quality factor: 1.0 (good) - 3.0 (poor)
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • PipingFivScreening

  • Method Details

    • screenGas

      public static FivLikelihoodResult screenGas(String circuitName, double density, double velocity, double outsideDiameter, double wallThickness, int branchCount, double pulsationFactor, double supportQualityFactor)
      Performs FIV screening for a gas service circuit.
      Parameters:
      circuitName - circuit identifier
      density - gas density at line conditions, kg/m³
      velocity - gas velocity at line conditions, m/s
      outsideDiameter - pipe OD, m (must be > 0)
      wallThickness - pipe wall thickness, m (must be > 0)
      branchCount - number of small-bore branches
      pulsationFactor - 1.0 (steady) to 4.0 (high-pulsation source)
      supportQualityFactor - 1.0 (good) to 3.0 (poor)
      Returns:
      FIV LOF result

    • screenLiquid

      public static FivLikelihoodResult screenLiquid(String circuitName, double velocity, double outsideDiameter, double wallThickness, int branchCount, double supportQualityFactor)
      Performs FIV screening for a liquid service circuit.
      Parameters:
      circuitName - circuit identifier
      velocity - liquid velocity at line conditions, m/s
      outsideDiameter - pipe OD, m (must be > 0)
      wallThickness - pipe wall thickness, m (must be > 0)
      branchCount - number of small-bore branches
      supportQualityFactor - 1.0 (good) to 3.0 (poor)
      Returns:
      FIV LOF result

    • bandFor

      public static PipingFivLikelihood bandFor(double lof)
      Maps a LOF score to the AVIFF likelihood band.
      Parameters:
      lof - normalised likelihood of failure
      Returns:
      likelihood band

    • recommendation

      public static String recommendation(PipingFivLikelihood band)
      Returns the AVIFF recommendation for a band.
      Parameters:
      band - likelihood band
      Returns:
      recommendation text

    • clamp

      private static double clamp(double v, double lo, double hi)
